invalidation.zh: 失效条件：价格跌破$0.085（基于ATR 0.0013调整），或融资费率Z-score回升至中性（如>-50%），或BTC大幅下跌导致相关性拖累（BTC相关性0.8712高）。
invalidation.en: Invalidation: Price breaks below $0.085 (adjusted based on ATR 0.0013), or funding rate Z-score recovers to neutral (e.g., >-50%), or BTC declines significantly causing correlation drag (BTC correlation 0.8712 high).

invalidation.zh: 失效条件：价格跌破$1900（基于ATR 23.9调整），或融资费率Z-score回升至中性（如>-50%），或BTC大幅下跌拖累（BTC相关性0.9499高）。
invalidation.en: Invalidation: Price breaks below $1900 (adjusted based on ATR 23.9), or funding rate Z-score recovers to neutral (e.g., >-50%), or BTC declines significantly dragging it down (BTC correlation 0.9499 high).
